name: GEOFlow 14 Knowledge Paper
description: A document-like knowledge variant with soft paper rhythm, calm cards, and low-noise navigation. Preserves GEOFlow frontend data contracts and derives from the NetEase News Inspired base theme.
notes: Generated as a high-level visual variant inspired by Notion. It does not copy logos, assets, content, or proprietary source code.
Keeps GEOFlow Blade variables, SEO meta fields, JSON-LD schema output, category navigation, article routes, and markdown HTML rendering intact.
Visual differences are concentrated in theme.css and documented in tokens.json for future maintenance.
